findings.issue: Security audit logs need retention and export sink
findings.evidence_span: prod.audit.enabled is true but retention_days and export_sink are missing
findings.recommended_fix: Require retention_days and export_sink for production audit logs.

findings.issue: Production config must use secret references rather than literals
findings.evidence_span: api_token is a test placeholder in a dev-only block, not production
findings.recommended_fix: Gate findings on environment and ignore explicitly dev/test-only placeholders.

findings.issue: Production external endpoints must use TLS
findings.evidence_span: prod.external_url uses https, so this should not be flagged
findings.recommended_fix: Check scheme only in production endpoints and avoid flagging compliant https values.
